scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n "INFRA,BFF,WEB" -c "blue,magenta,green" "docker-compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up redis postgres" "wait-on tcp:5432 tcp:6379 && pnpm --filter @vendora/bff dev" "wait-on tcp:4000 && pnpm --filter @vendora/web dev"
scripts.ci: pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter @vendora/bff test && pnpm e2e:ci && pnpm perf:ci
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter "./packages/**" build && pnpm check:legacy-hours && pnpm --filter @vendora/bff smoke:upstream:http && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm --filter @vendora/web typecheck:test && pnpm -r lint && pnpm guardrails:themes && pnpm --filter @vendora/bff test && pnpm --filter @vendora/bff check:tenant-prisma && pnpm --filter @vendora/bff check:orderline-variant && pnpm --filter @vendora/database test:isolation && pnpm --filter @vendora/database check:default-variant
